content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the branch diff against `origin/master` excluding `.ralph-burning/`, and read the changed implementation files end-to-end (`src/test_support/br.rs`, `src/test_support/bv.rs`, `src/test_support/e2e_fixtures.rs`) along with the relevant fixture and adapter types they integrate with. I did not find any fix-now correctness, safety, or robustness issues in the submitted changes. Verification: targeted `cargo test build_e2e_milestone_scenario_fixture_smoke_test --lib`, `cargo test test_support:: --lib`, and full `cargo test --lib` all passed locally. `cargo clippy --tests --lib -- -D warnings` still fails on pre-existing unrelated warnings outside this change, and `nix build` did not complete within the review window.

## Amendments

None.
